acceptance.proof: A synthetic joined active-interface peer sends only the exact sanitized LSLC-004K-observed query shape and receives one bounded response from unchanged production code.
Production bytes remain identical to the LSLC-004J baseline while damaged group, interface, query, response, deadline/cancellation, and cleanup evidence rejects.
Owner, Standard, public-boundary, documentation/instruction, and workflow gates pass without runtime or authority widening.

commit_policy: Commit lifecycle separately; test-only source changes may not alter any production byte and all private official drivers, raw records, interface/endpoint details, diagnostics, environment, and machine identity remain outside the repository.

instruction_surfaces.change_reason: Bound the test-only official-query production conformance and nonclaims.
Route conformance separately from production compatibility claims.
Bind the observed query shape to test-only production conformance and limitations.
Preserve independent synthetic fixture and private oracle separation.
Route focused damaged, owner, Standard, and workflow checks.
Existing compatibility and authority lanes cover this test-only composition.
instruction_surfaces.validation: Review against the resolved work environment.

instruction_surfaces.change_reason: Existing observation-to-conformance and production/test separation rules apply.
instruction_surfaces.validation: Review socket, protocol, cleanup, and authority surfaces.

non_scope: Any production runtime/API/activation byte change, responder or requester widening, interface enumeration or default selection, ambient fallback, other groups/ports/address families, non-explicit interfaces, retries/background workers, devices, dependencies, unsafe/FFI, copied official source, private raw records/endpoints/diagnostics, broad compatibility, routing/admission/commands, or Manifold authority.
objective: Add only test-only conformance that presents the exact sanitized LSLC-004K-observed pinned-official query shape to the unchanged capability-gated responder on one caller-explicit concrete IPv4 interface at exact 239.255.172.215:16571, verifying one bounded response, deadline/cancellation, cleanup, and production-prefix binding.
outputs: One test-only synthetic active-interface composition bound to the sanitized LSLC-004K official query hash and unchanged production prefix.
Focused positive and damaged checks proving exact group/interface/query scope, finite behavior, cleanup, and production-byte immutability.
Minimal fixture, documentation, policy, public-boundary, instruction, and workflow routes.
